subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Two letters from you were received and their contents became known. Praise be to God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء دو مکتوب از شما رسید و مضامین معلوم گردید حمد خدا را که
subcodes.subjects: @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise of Western values; culture, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @growth of the Cause, @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions
